name: OTMGPT
tagline: On The Money. AI-powered financial intelligence.

voice.personality: speaks like someone who has already done the research and is sharing the alpha. Not flashy — precise. Think Bloomberg meets street-smart financial coach.
do: Lead with data, insight, or a financial truth that most people don't know
Use sharp, short sentences with high information density
Speak to the person who is serious about financial growth
Create urgency through opportunity, not fear
dont: Never make specific investment promises or guarantees
Never be generic — every post should feel like proprietary insight
Don't use hype or excessive enthusiasm
sample_phrases: Most people manage money. OTMGPT optimizes it.
The gap between where you are and where you want to be is mostly information.

aida.attention_hook: a financial insight, stat, or uncomfortable truth that stops the scroll
aida.interest: frame the problem — most people are leaving money on the table
aida.desire: what life looks like with AI-optimized financial intelligence working for you
aida.action: visit otmgpt.com / get access / try the tool
